note: Test cases for the skill-triggering-accuracy grader. Each case is the user's request as it would arrive in an operator-facing prompt. expectedSkill is the single correct pick; expectedSkills (array) is for ambiguous cases where any of several skills is acceptable. expectedSkill: 'none' means no skill should fire. All scenarios use generic placeholders; no PII, no real engineer names, no real customer data.

cases.request: Help me write a post-mortem for last week's outage.
We just had a Sev 1. What do we do first?
Our PDP for the daily greens powder is converting at 1.2%. Industry benchmark is 2-3%. What's broken?
cases.rationale: PDP conversion lift is the core CRO domain.

cases.request: I need to design an A/B test for a new pricing page. How do I size it?
cases.rationale: Sample-size and test design are A/B testing skill domain.

cases.request: Our cart abandonment rate is 78%. Build me a recovery flow.
Write me a runbook for restarting our checkout queue worker.
cases.rationale: Runbook authoring is the explicit skill.

cases.request: I want to model an SLO for our checkout API. What's a reasonable target?
We're rolling out a new feature flag. What's the right rollout shape and kill-switch design?
Plan a load test for our checkout flow before the holiday season.
I'm doing a threat-model on our new auth flow. Walk me through STRIDE for the login endpoint.
Help me draft email copy for a winback campaign targeting customers who haven't ordered in 6 months.
Our subscription churn just spiked 4 points month-over-month. What do I look at first?
I need to write an ADR for our switch from Postgres to a managed serverless DB.
We're rotating database credentials next sprint. What's the safe approach?
I want to do an SEO audit on our top 10 collection pages.
Help me write good schema markup for our supplement PDPs so they show up in rich results.
We need a positioning statement for our new electrolyte SKU. The current messaging is muddled.
The latency on our /checkout endpoint p99 just doubled but nothing in the deploy log explains it.
cases.rationale: Latency regression diagnosis without naming the skill.

cases.request: Our new checkout shipped last night and now everything's burning. The team is in a Zoom and nobody knows who owns what.
We're spending $80 CAC and our LTV looks like $120. Channel-mix question: should we lean more into Meta or pull back?
We have a 4M-user product and a dev wants to add user_id as a Prometheus label. Is this a problem?
Mobile is converting 3x worse than desktop on our PDP. Help me figure out why.
cases.rationale: Device-split conversion gap is a core CRO diagnosis.

cases.request: Our oncall rotation feels brutal. Two people doing 1-week shifts. Everyone is burning out.
cases.rationale: Oncall structure problem without naming the skill.

cases.request: We're shipping a breaking change to our public API in 90 days. How do we communicate this to integrators?
cases.rationale: Public API breaking change is the deprecation playbook.

cases.request: I want to upgrade us from Node 18 to Node 22. What can go wrong and how do I sequence it?
Our flagship powder is $42 single, $112 for a 3-pack. What other tiers should we offer to lift AOV?
We rewrote the homepage hero and conversions went up 12%. How do I know it wasn't just seasonality?
We have customers asking for an iOS app, an Android app, and a Spanish version. What do I prioritize?
Our Meta ad creative is fatigued. CPMs are climbing and CTR is dropping every week.
cases.rationale: Ad creative fatigue is the creative skill domain.

cases.request: Walk me through what should be in our quarterly disaster-recovery drill.
What's the weather in Tokyo today?
Translate 'good morning' into Japanese.
cases.rationale: General language task, not a skill domain.

cases.request: Tell me a joke about graph databases.
Help me plan a vacation to Lisbon next month.
What's 47 times 92?
Write me a haiku about distributed systems.
cases.rationale: Creative one-off, not a skill workflow.

cases.request: Our cart conversion is dropping. Should I fix the cart page or fix the abandonment flow?
cases.rationale: Could be CRO (fix the page) or cart-abandonment-recovery (fix the flow); both are valid framings.

cases.request: We had a production outage caused by a bad migration. Walk me through what to do.
cases.rationale: Active fire (incident-response), the diagnosis (root-cause-analysis), or the writeup (post-mortem-writing) are all plausible.

cases.request: Our checkout button copy is flat. Should we test variations?
cases.rationale: Copy rewrite (copywriting), conversion lift (cro), or test design (ab-testing) are all reasonable.

cases.request: We want to give engineers more on-call autonomy without burning them out.
cases.rationale: Rotation shape, handoff rituals, and ownership boundaries all touch this.

cases.request: How do we get loyal customers to buy more often?
cases.rationale: Repeat-purchase mechanics, loyalty program, or subscription-growth all fit the framing.

cases.request: We're getting hammered by detractors on social. Help me respond.
cases.rationale: Detractor handling specifically, or broader social strategy.
